title: Medieval Stuff
description: Just a small mod which will be expanded in future with lots of content.
body:
## Main
Medieval stuff is a fantasy mod which I have big plans on. It adds some new items, blocks, tools, armor and a mob. The project is currently in alpha so it might be a bit raw. I hope you enjoy my mod!

>  If you don't understand the progression in mod then just play as you do it normally and try to find new recipes and things(generation and mob) in your Minecraft world!

### Status Update
> The metallurgy update will be 0.3 and the 0.2 update is going to be "The Beast of the Swamps". That's because I need to do a lot of polishing and additions to metallurgy, so it's really interesting and fun. With the 0.2 you'll be able to test features that are already done. Don't worry about metallurgy. I will make 0.2 in a few weeks and then continue working on metallurgy

## Small Q&A
#### Can I make a port for Forge (NeoForge/Quilt) or a backport/futureport of Medieval Stuff?
Sorry but no. I don't give anyone a permission to make any port of my mod! It is going to be in future! Developing a mod for a few modloaders instead of one takes a lot time so for now just use it on Fabric.

#### Can I include Medieval Stuff in my modpack?
Yes! Feel free to include my mod in any of your modpacks! Just remember to leave the credits please.

#### Why is it called _Medieval Stuff_ ?
The answer is... I don't know! it just sounded cool so I decided to pick this name!

#### Can I upload Medieval Stuff on CurseForge or any other site?
The answer is _no_ ! Don't even ask me about it. Just download my mod from Modrinth!


## Tech Part
### You need Fabric Api for mod to work correctly!

### Currently supported languages (some translation issues might present!):
> #### en_us (English, United States)
> #### ru_ru (Russian, Russia)
